name: io.github.COSTRINITY/vigil-compliance-mcp
description: Safety and compliance oversight layer for AI agents: check risky actions before they run, get an allow/deny/hold decision, and keep a signed, auditable record so a human can monitor and keep the agent in check. Covers dangerous shell/SQL/secret-exfil actions plus the EU AI Act, India's DPDP, and 11 more regimes. Zero setup: the first tool call self-provisions a trial key.

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_OWNER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your VIGIL operator UUID. Optional: if unset, the first tool call self-provisions a restricted trial key.

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your VIGIL API key (vigil_...). Optional: self-provisioned if unset.

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email to own the self-provisioned trial account. Optional: a throwaway is used if unset (claim later to bind a real email).

environmentVariables.name: VIGIL_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: VIGIL base URL; override only for self-hosted.
